summary: Tested Teacher Import from Excel feature and Frontend UI. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified 3 buttons on manage-teachers page (إضافة معلم, استيراد Excel, استعادة). Students page selection mode buttons are present in code but page had slow loading in Playwright tests.

integration_issues.issue: Page shows perpetual loading spinner in Playwright tests, possibly due to network latency or auth state. Backend /api/students returns 72 students successfully via curl.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - May be test environment specific

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/template/teachers - Returns Excel file with correct columns (الرقم الوظيفي, اسم المعلم, النصاب الأسبوعي) and sample data
POST /api/import/teachers - Correctly requires department_id parameter (returns 400 if missing)
POST /api/import/teachers - Validates all 3 required columns present in Excel file
POST /api/import/teachers - Rejects duplicate teacher_id entries with proper error message
Frontend manage-teachers.tsx has all 3 buttons: إضافة معلم (blue), استيراد Excel (green), استعادة (blue)
Frontend students.tsx has selection mode with 4 bulk actions: تفعيل, إلغاء تفعيل, تغيير المستوى, حذف

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Teachers page verified, Students page had loading issues

seed_data_creation: Test teachers created: TESTIMPORT{timestamp}A, TESTIMPORT{timestamp}B, TESTDUP{timestamp} - with auto-activated accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher import feature fully working. Backend validates: department_id required, 3 columns required (الرقم الوظيفي, اسم المعلم, النصاب الأسبوعي), rejects duplicates, auto-activates accounts. Frontend buttons verified via code review and partial Playwright testing.

verified_features.GET /api/template/teachers: PASS - Returns Excel with correct columns and sample data
verified_features.POST /api/import/teachers (no dept_id): PASS - Returns 400 with error about department
verified_features.POST /api/import/teachers (missing colum: PASS - Returns 400 for each missing column
verified_features.POST /api/import/teachers (success): PASS - Imports teachers and auto-activates accounts
verified_features.POST /api/import/teachers (duplicates): PASS - Returns 0 imported with error about existing teacher
verified_features.Frontend: manage-teachers 3 buttons: PASS - Verified via screenshot and code review
verified_features.Frontend: students selection mode: VERIFIED in code - 4 bulk action buttons present (lines 763-800)
